items.context: Define the map Φ from the fundamental group to the fiber, which gives the lifting correspondence.

items.context: Compute the fundamental group of the connected sum, identified immediately afterward as T²#T².

items.context: “when \(K\) is identified with the subgroup \(\{(1,K)\mid k\in K\}\) of \(G\)”
items.message: Corrected the second coordinate in the displayed copy of K from the group K itself to the element k; this is uniquely determined by the set-builder variable and the identification of K as a subgroup of the semidirect product.

items.context: Problem 3(a): “Using the modified Gramm-Schmidt process, write out expressions for q₁, q₂, q₃…”
items.message: Corrected the misspelling of the named orthogonalization process.
Corrected the ambient Euclidean space in the definition of the 2-sphere from \(R^2\) to \(R^3\), as uniquely determined by the immediate context.
